description: Parallel task dispatcher — reads ORCHESTRATION.md depends_on graph and spawns independent tasks concurrently via child_process

orchestrationDependsOn.description: A new column in ORCHESTRATION.md tables: 'Depends On' lists task IDs that must be DONE before this task can start

dispatch.description: Identify tasks whose dependencies are met and spawn up to n concurrent agent processes

options.--parallel: Maximum number of concurrent agent processes (required)
options.--sprint: Only consider tasks in this sprint (optional)
options.--dry-run: Show what would be dispatched without executing
options.--agent: Only dispatch tasks for a specific agent slug

status.description: Show currently running dispatcher processes and their task assignments

kill.description: Kill a specific dispatched task process

constraints.cwdGuard: Each spawned process inherits the CWD guard from handoff.js to prevent cross-project pollution
constraints.telemetryContext: Each spawned process receives a unique telemetry context ID for tracing

circuitBreaker.action: If a task fails gate >3 times, it is removed from the parallel queue and escalated to HITL

integrationPoints: Add 'Depends On' column to all existing ORCHESTRATION.md task tables
Dispatcher calls handoff.js for each dispatched task
Dispatcher respects circuit breakers from escalate-lead.js
Telemetry events logged for each dispatched task start/end
